The diflferent kinds of earth recommended for the ccnstmction
of houses for the different classes of the society are likewise recom-
mended to persons of various classes for constructing temples,
[Vide LIII. 96-97 supra for the varieties of soil recommended.
This shows that each community or class had its own temple,]

The temple site should always be divided into 64 squares.
Its central or main gate would be auspicious if situated in one of
the four cardinal directions,
[Vide LIII. 65 supra and diagram 2 for the subdivision of the
site.]
The author next gives the dimensions of temples.
